 051: def fixed_point_accum(int n):
 052:     """Accumulate n fixed-point values with mixed arithmetic operations.
 053: 
 054:     Generates deterministic fixed-point numbers and combines them using
 055:     __add__, __sub__, __mul__, __iadd__, __neg__, and __bool__.
 056: 
 057:     Args:
 058:         n: Number of values to accumulate.
 059: 
 060:     Returns:
 061:         Final integer value (scaled by 1000).
 062:     """
+063:     cdef FixedPoint accum = FixedPoint(1000)  # Start at 1.000
  __pyx_t_2 = NULL;
  __pyx_t_3 = 1;

 073: 
 074:         # Generate a fixed-point value in range [-5.000, 5.000]
+075:         raw = <long long>(h1 % 10001) - 5000

+076:         fp = FixedPoint(raw)
    __pyx_t_2 = NULL;

 077: 
 078:         # Choose operation based on h2
+079:         op = h2 % 5
    __pyx_v_op = (__pyx_v_h2 % 5);

 080: 
+081:         if op == 0:
    switch (__pyx_v_op) {
      case 0:
